title: Qlog Main Schema Parity Verification
scope: Verify the main-schema guidance added after comparing the repository baseline with the current official qlog main-schema draft page.
verification_method: Requirement-homed tests for already-supported retained-model behavior, reusable event-schema metadata catalogs, the explicit capture-start gate, and file-sink path resolution, SpecTrace JSON validation, and the qlog requirement-home coverage audit.
preconditions: The official qlog main-schema source used for the refresh is identified in the requirement upstream references.
The repository has not yet promoted the QUICWG latest preview into the local source snapshot manifest.
procedure: Run scripts/Validate-SpecTraceJson.ps1 over the qlog canonical artifacts.
Run the core, import, and QUIC qlog test projects.
Review active requirement-home tests before claiming complete main-schema parity for the remaining maintenance follow-up.
Refresh the pinned source snapshot and repeat the comparison when the upstream draft advances.
expected_result: Implemented main-schema guidance has executable requirement-home proof, the reusable event-schema catalogs preserve event importance metadata, the explicit capture-start gate prevents qlog writes until the caller opts in, the file sinks honor QLOGDIR for relative file names, and the canonical qlog SpecTrace corpus remains valid.
